data.body: PROGRESS (session 2 cont.): S3 AC5 done (concurrency cancel-in-progress evidence on change 234). S3 AC4 in flight: confirmed MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE requires an ISOLATED feature file (main churn on the same file -> REWORK, both votes drop — proven on 215 PS2). Built change 234 (isolated marker docs/s3/ac4-marker.txt): PS1 REWORK, PS2 MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE (both votes earned). Need main to advance for PS3 to show LLM carries + Verified reruns. IN GERRIT: 234 (AC4, both votes, needs PS3), 236 (fern-belief-gap: exclude feature/** from test/eval/optionality push triggers, LLM+1, CI running), 237 (S4 docs: CONTRIBUTING §4 feature-branch flow + CLAUDE.md + review-bot-ops merge-change ops + github-mirror-lock two-vote fix; S4 sweep clean, zero unjustified hits). S4 (perky-art-yodel) claimed. Test changes 233/234 to abandon after AC4. REMAINING: close S3 (AC4 PS3), close S4 (237 lands), S5 7-scenario E2E (bot now S2-ready), S6, spy-luge-wool, merge_change_409_guard event.
